matrix_rules.description: If prior appointment exists, Benjamin is permitted to act within valid guardian scope for Jane.

closure_actions.closure_action: Obtain certified guardianship appointment order/docket showing appointment identity and effective date.

matrix_rules.description: If prior appointment exists and interference is alleged, the alleged interfering actor is forbidden from interference.

closure_actions.closure_action: Obtain certified guardianship appointment order/docket showing appointment identity and effective date.
Convert allegation to verified with certified records, transcripts, or authenticated communications.

matrix_rules.description: If prior appointment is in force and an alleged actor disregarded the order, that actor was obligated to comply or seek relief.

closure_actions.closure_action: Obtain certified guardianship appointment order/docket showing appointment identity and effective date.
Convert allegation to verified with certified records, transcripts, or authenticated communications.

matrix_rules.description: If no further service was required because Solomon appeared, later failure to appear supports an obligation to appear and answer.

closure_actions.closure_action: Collect hearing register, appearance minute entry, and proof of service/order-to-appear documentation.

matrix_rules.description: If issue preclusion applies, Solomon is forbidden from relitigating the precluded issue.

closure_actions.closure_action: Promote theory to verified only after documentary proof is collected and reviewed for actor/date consistency.
Collect the newer filing plus certified prior final judgment/order and issue-identity comparison chart.

matrix_rules.description: If compel-appearance authority is available and the claimed nonappearance predicate is later proved, the case posture may seek compelled appearance.

closure_actions.closure_action: Collect hearing register, appearance minute entry, and proof of service/order-to-appear documentation.

matrix_rules.description: If any subpoena service is completed and OR-joined protocol is defined, responding custodians are obligated in this model to execute the protocol and produce a search execution report.

closure_actions.closure_action: Update active service log statuses/dates to reflect executed service or response milestones, then regenerate artifacts.

matrix_rules.description: If an incomplete subpoena response is present and workflow components are staged, Benjamin is permitted in this model to issue a deficiency notice and cure deadline.

closure_actions.closure_action: Update active service log statuses/dates to reflect executed service or response milestones, then regenerate artifacts.

matrix_rules.description: If deficiency notices are in play and compel templates are staged, Benjamin is permitted in this model to move to compel and seek sanctions for noncompliance.

closure_actions.closure_action: Provide records that make this antecedent true, or revise the dependent rule if the predicate should remain false.

matrix_rules.description: If authority table placeholders remain unresolved, the case posture is obligated to finalize governing citations before final filing use.

closure_actions.closure_action: Replace placeholder citations with finalized ORS/ORCP/case authority entries, then regenerate artifacts.

open_elements.label: Certified service or appearance record for litigation use
open_elements.note: The local repository supports notice strongly, but a cleaner certified docket / appearance record remains preferable for filing-grade contempt proof.

open_elements.label: Subpoena service stage complete
open_elements.note: Promotes automatically from the active service log once any subpoena service is logged.

open_elements.label: Deficiency or compel stage reached
open_elements.note: Promotes automatically from the active service log when a deficiency notice or motion-to-compel stage is entered.

open_elements.label: Improper purpose or unsupported filing proof tied to a specific filing
open_elements.note: The current record supports inquiry and caution, but final ORCP 17 findings still require the filing-by-filing manifest to identify the challenged filing and map the specific sanction predicates.

open_elements.label: Improper purpose mapped to a specific filing
open_elements.note: Current candidate theory only: the challenged filing may have functioned to obtain control, create delay, or exert collateral pressure rather than to seek only properly bounded judicial relief. This remains proof-gated and should not be treated as established absent stronger filing-specific record support.

open_elements.label: Unsupported legal position mapped to a specific filing
open_elements.note: Current candidate theory only: the challenged filing may depend on a legal position that becomes unsupported if certified prior-proceeding materials and completed issue-preclusion mapping later show that the filing sought to relitigate an already-resolved authority issue. This remains proof-gated.

open_elements.label: Unsupported factual assertion mapped to a specific filing
open_elements.note: Current candidate theory only: the petition-side statement that no guardian had previously been appointed for Jane Cortez may become a contradicted factual assertion if a certified prior appointment order is later staged and verified. This remains proof-gated.

open_elements.label: Candidate barred-refile theory identified
open_elements.note: The local model carries a barred-refile candidate theory, but not yet a certified prior proceeding record proving application of the doctrine.

open_elements.label: Prior separate proceeding established by source record
open_elements.note: Promotes automatically when certified prior-order and docket/register materials are staged in evidence_notes/certified_records.

open_elements.label: Identical issue, finality, party/privity, and full-and-fair opportunity mapped from certified materials
open_elements.note: These elements remain open until certified prior-order, docket, and hearing materials are staged and the issue_preclusion_mapping.json manifest marks the element mapping complete.

open_elements.label: Identical issue mapped from certified materials
open_elements.note: Candidate sources indicate potential overlap of the guardianship authority issue across filings. open_elements.label: Finality mapped from certified materials
open_elements.note: Current index did not yield reliable finality artifacts; certified final order and register are still required.
